description: Mixed severity issues: prototype pollution, magic numbers, inconsistent returns

issues.question: Q2
issues.description: Prototype pollution — iterating userInput with for..in copies __proto__ and constructor
issues.expected_fix: use Object.assign, spread operator, or hasOwnProperty check

issues.question: Q5
issues.description: Magic number 42 and discount rates 0.15/0.05 without named constants
issues.expected_fix: extract to named constants with descriptive names

issues.question: Q1
issues.description: Inconsistent return types — returns number or string 'unknown'
issues.expected_fix: return consistent type (null or NaN for invalid)

false_positive_traps: Line 4: crypto.randomBytes is secure random — not weak crypto
Line 33: formatCount returns consistent string type — ternary is fine
